series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence or forms received by Board expressing dissatisfaction with education or training program and not containing a complaint regarding a license.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: next Board meeting following receipt of dissatisfaction form, at which program''s approval status is reviewed and acted upon by Board. ; Electronic: next Board meeting following receipt of dissatisfaction form, at which program''s approval status is reviewed and acted upon by Board
